name: zsnd_snapshot_destroy
description: zSndPlayHandleSnapshot::Destroy walks the circular snapshot list, unlinks and deletes every node, deletes the list head, clears fields, deletes self, and returns 1.
known_limits: VC5SP3 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 86 unmasked mismatches after relocation masking; Binary Ninja body is 125 bytes and the VC object body is 128 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
Profile sweep found all tested VC5SP3 profiles tied as closest at 86 mismatches; VC6 profiles were materially worse at 102 mismatches.
Source now uses the recovered byte-mask list-end test shape; remaining drift is branch materialization around the sentinel-list empty and back-edge tests.
